summary: This video is an Inovus Medical LapAR platform promotional/instructional animation. It illustrates the digital ecosystem for FLS training (with references to appendectomy, suturing, ligations, and other FLS tasks) but does not contain actual task performance for scoring. The content demonstrates augmented feedback, analytics, and collaborative learning features of the LapAR system rather than showing a trainee performing an FLS task.
